items.name: Smart-Energy-Management-System
items.description: The Smart Energy Management System uses an ESP32 to monitor real-time voltage, current, power, and motion. Data is displayed on an LCD and remotely through a web dashboard and Blynk. It enhances energy efficiency, detects abnormal usage, and supports smart power management in labs, hostels, classrooms, and canteens.
